name: Select.Option
summary: A single option inside a `Select`, carrying its `value` and label children; author one per choice as a direct `Select` child — it forwards `className`/`style`/`id`/`data-*` onto the rendered `<li>`.

props.name: sx
props.description: Inline styles (with CSS var support); merged over `style` (sx wins).

props.name: preset
props.description: One or many style-preset names registered via `definePreset()`
